title: SEC1: MessageCreateInput.body_type doc omits Rich variant
description: methods/mod.rs line 232-233: doc comment says 'Use Plain or Markdown; Unknown(s) passes s as-is' — silently omits BodyType::Rich, which is now a first-class variant. A caller writing a rich-message client reads this doc and does not discover Rich exists. Fix: add Rich to the doc examples alongside Plain and Markdown.
